treatment_information.treatment_response: Developed iatrogenic botulism with nasal speech, progressive dysphagia, and noticeable weakness in bulbar and upper limb muscles

treatment_information.dosage_or_details: 60 mg twice a day for 2 months

treatment_timeline.event: Received 30 U onabotulinumtoxinA (Botox) in the right axillary for hyperhidrosis
Developed nasal speech and progressive dysphagia
Admitted to hospital due to dyspnea
Started Mestinon (pyridostigmine) 60 mg twice a day
Patient was in good health condition without any residual symptoms

patient_outcome.complications: Iatrogenic botulism with nasal speech, progressive dysphagia, and noticeable weakness in bulbar and upper limb muscles
patient_outcome.quality_of_life: Good health condition without any residual symptoms
